field_proposals.rationale: Well-known fixed set of NYC boroughs, normalize case.
Operator is an agency name, better modeled as a relation context, not a closed enumeration.
Duration values are free-text descriptions with inconsistent formats; insufficient for enum.
Publisher is an organizational entity, relation context.
Array of boroughs; same well-known set.
Only two distinct date strings, too sparse to normalize or structure.
Only two distinct date strings, too sparse.
Only two distinct date strings, too sparse.
Only two distinct date strings, too sparse.

key_dispositions.rationale: Technical merge field, not meaningful as a payload field.
Single occurrence of a legislative reference; too sparse to model.
Already normalized version of borough; alias to borough enum.
Already normalized version of boroughs; alias to boroughs enum.
Sparse free-text street name, not structured.
Sparse array of street names, not a stable enum.
Consistently used set of project status values (planned, implemented, active, etc.); promote to enum.
Free-text location description, useful as a field.
List of partner agencies; relation context.
Single occurrence of a phase name; too sparse.
Frequently used with consistent set of categories (bus_lane, busway, etc.); promotes to enum.
List of route identifiers; relation context.
List of subway line identifiers; relation context.

proposal.notes: Key enums proposed for borough, boroughs, document_time_status, and project_family. Operator, publisher, agencies, and route lists kept as relation context.
